title: filago lutescens subsp. canescens
intro: Filago lutescens subsp. canescens, also known as woolly cudweed, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family that has adapted to grow in poor soil and dry conditions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of woolly cudweed include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as promoting wound healing and soothing digestive issues. Woolly cudweed can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies for its topical and internal medicinal applications.
